About Webazi

Your Digital Partner in Nairobi

Welcome to Webazi Digital Solutions — a Parklands, Nairobi-based digital agency helping businesses thrive online through exceptional web design, SEO, social media management, and branding.

We understand that your brand is more than a logo — it's your 24/7 storefront and your most powerful marketing tool. We create user-friendly, mobile-responsive websites and captivating graphics tailored to your goals.

  • Custom websites designed for the Kenyan market
  • M-Pesa payment integration on all e-commerce builds

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to build a website?
Starter (1 page): 2–5 days. Business (5 pages): 7 days. Professional (15 pages): 10 days. Enterprise: up to 14 days.
Do you provide domain and hosting?
Domain and hosting are not included but we guide you through purchasing them at cost price. We recommend Namecheap or Hostinger.
Will my website work on mobile phones?
Yes — every website we build is fully responsive and tested on Android, iPhone, tablets and desktop.
Can you integrate M-Pesa on my website?
Yes — we offer Daraja STK Push integration. You'll need a registered Safaricom Daraja account (we guide you through setup).
How many revisions are included?
Starter: 1 revision. Business: 2. Professional: 3. Additional revisions are KES 2,000 per round.
Do you offer social media separately?
Yes — standalone social media from KES 7,000/month. Minimum 3-month commitment applies.

Design Trends

Top 5 Web Design Trends in Kenya for 2025

The digital landscape in Kenya is evolving rapidly. Businesses that keep up with modern web design trends are seeing significantly higher engagement and conversion rates. Here are the top 5 trends shaping Kenyan business websites in 2025.

1. Mobile-First Design

Over 90% of Kenyans access the internet via mobile phones. Websites that prioritise mobile experience — fast loading, thumb-friendly navigation, and readable fonts — consistently outperform desktop-first sites on Google rankings and user retention.

2. Dark Mode Interfaces

Dark mode is no longer a luxury — users expect it. It reduces eye strain, saves battery on OLED screens (common in mid-range Kenyan phones), and gives websites a premium, modern aesthetic that builds brand credibility.

3. Micro-Animations & Scroll Effects

Subtle animations — cards that fade in, buttons that pulse, counters that count up — keep users engaged and on-page longer. Google factors dwell time into rankings, making this both a UX and SEO win.

4. WhatsApp & M-Pesa Integration

Kenyan customers trust WhatsApp and M-Pesa. Websites with floating WhatsApp buttons and M-Pesa payment options convert significantly better than those without — especially for service businesses and e-commerce.

5. Minimalist, Fast-Loading Pages

Heavy, cluttered websites are dying. Clean, fast pages with clear CTAs and focused content win — both with users and Google. Page speed is a confirmed ranking factor, and every second of delay costs conversions.

Ready to give your business a modern, trend-setting website?

SEO & Marketing

How a Website Boosts Your Google Rankings in Kenya

When a potential customer in Nairobi searches "plumber near me" or "web designer Parklands," Google decides which businesses to show first. Your website is the single biggest factor in that decision. Here's how it works.

Google Rewards Relevance & Speed

A website with proper keyword targeting, fast load times, and mobile optimisation signals to Google that your business is legitimate and relevant. Without a website, you simply don't exist in search results.

On-Page SEO is Everything

Meta titles, meta descriptions, H1/H2 tags, image alt text, and internal linking — these are the building blocks of Google visibility. At Webazi, every website we build includes full on-page SEO from day one.

Google My Business + Website = Domination

Combining a well-optimised website with a verified Google My Business profile puts your business on the map — literally. You show up in local searches, Google Maps, and the coveted "3-pack" at the top of results.

Content Builds Authority

Regularly updated blogs, service pages, and FAQs tell Google your site is active and authoritative. Businesses that blog consistently get 55% more website visitors. Start now — even 1 article a month makes a difference.

Want to rank higher on Google? Our SEO package starts at KES 10,000.

Payments

Why Every Nairobi Business Needs M-Pesa on Their Website

Kenya leads the world in mobile money adoption. With over 30 million active M-Pesa users, not having M-Pesa on your website is like not accepting cash. Here's why it's no longer optional for Nairobi businesses.

Kenyans Trust M-Pesa Above All

Credit cards remain low-adoption in Kenya. M-Pesa is what your customers use daily — for rent, shopping, food, everything. When your website accepts M-Pesa at checkout, the friction disappears and conversions skyrocket.

The Daraja STK Push Experience

With Safaricom's Daraja API integrated into your website, customers click "Pay," enter their phone number, and receive an M-Pesa prompt on their phone. Payment confirmed in seconds. No redirects, no frustration.

24/7 Revenue Without Staff

Once M-Pesa is on your website, your business collects money while you sleep. Orders are processed automatically, payments confirmed instantly, and receipts sent — all without a single phone call or manual transfer.

Real Business Impact

Our clients who add M-Pesa integration see an average 40% increase in completed online orders within the first month. The investment pays for itself quickly — and keeps paying.

Add M-Pesa to your website from KES 15,000. One-time setup, lifetime revenue.

Branding

The Power of Strong Branding for Kenyan SMEs

In a crowded Nairobi market, your brand is the first thing customers notice — and often the only reason they choose you over a competitor. Here's why investing in branding is the smartest move a Kenyan SME can make.

What Branding Actually Is

Branding is not just a logo. It's your colours, your fonts, your tone of voice, your packaging, your social media look, and how you make customers feel. A strong brand creates instant recognition and trust before a word is spoken.

Trust is Your Most Valuable Currency

In Kenya, customers buy from people they trust. A professional logo, consistent colours across your platforms, and a polished website signal that you're legitimate, established, and worth doing business with. Poor branding signals the opposite.

Consistency Across All Touchpoints

Your Facebook page, WhatsApp Business profile, business card, flyers, and website should all look like they belong to the same business. Inconsistency confuses customers and dilutes your brand value.

Branding Commands Premium Pricing

Well-branded businesses can charge more for the same service. Customers perceive higher quality and are willing to pay for it. A KES 8,000 brand kit from Webazi could directly translate to significantly higher prices you can charge your own clients.

Get your complete brand kit — logo, business card & social templates — for KES 8,000.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2025

Webazi Digital Solutions ("we", "our", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our website or use our services.

Information We Collect

We collect information you voluntarily provide via our contact forms, booking forms, or newsletter signup — including your name, email, phone number, and project details.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information solely to respond to enquiries, deliver requested services, send project updates, and — with consent — share occasional marketing updates via email or WhatsApp.

Data Protection

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. Your information is stored securely and only accessed by authorised personnel.

Your Rights

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us at webazidigitalsolutions@gmail.com.

Contact

Questions about this policy? Reach us at webazidigitalsolutions@gmail.com or +254 729 914 983.

Legal

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: 2025

1. Services

Webazi Digital Solutions provides web design, SEO, social media management, graphics design, and related digital services as described on this website and in individual quotations.

2. Payment Terms

A 50% deposit is required before work begins on most projects, with the balance due upon delivery/launch unless otherwise agreed in writing.

3. Revisions

Each package includes a set number of revision rounds as specified in your quotation. Additional revisions are billed at KES 2,000 per round.

4. Delivery Timelines

Timelines quoted are estimates and depend on timely client feedback and content provision. Delays caused by the client may extend delivery dates.

5. Ownership

Upon full payment, the client owns the final delivered website/designs. Webazi retains the right to showcase completed work in its portfolio unless otherwise agreed.

6. Support

30 days of post-launch bug-fix support is included at no extra cost. Ongoing maintenance beyond this period is available at an additional fee.

7. Refunds

Deposits are non-refundable once work has commenced. Contact us directly to discuss any concerns about project delivery.
